title: St. Vincent de Paul (Grants Pass)
html:
Stub. Catholic charity / thrift-and-food location on Riverside in Grants Pass that Yahir visits during the covid era HS-senior stretch. First surfaced in 2020 09 15 st vincent de paul yogurt ("At Vincent de Paul / Okay Store Store Riverside / Yogurt").

Connections

  • micah 6 food pantry · hope food pantry — the same Grants-Pass charity-economy circuit Yahir moved through
  • grants pass teen era
